market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Robinhood built a blockchain for tokenized stocks. Memecoins took over
articles.description: Robinhood Chain has pulled in $135 million of value and 800,000 addresses since July 1. Almost none of it is doing what the chain was built for.

articles.title: Bitcoin threatens $62K in risk-asset rout as Donald Trump says US will 'run' closed Hormuz Strait
articles.description: Bitcoin bulls faced an uphill struggle to preserve $62,000 as stocks opened down on Strait of Hormuz rhetoric between the US and Iran.

articles.title: Bolivia weighs adding Tether's USDT to its national payments system
articles.description: Crypto usage has spiked in the country, with transaction volumes hitting $430 million in the year after the central bank removed restrictions in mid-2024.

articles.title: 比太陽還古老！人類首度解碼星際彗星 3I/ATLAS 化學指紋，揭開遠古宇宙身世
articles.description: 天文學家利用位於智利的歐洲南方天文台（ESO）甚大望遠鏡（Very Large Telescope），詳細研究 […]

articles.title: SpaceX cleared to fly Starship again after booster failure in May
articles.description: This will be the first Starship test flight for SpaceX as a public company, testing the market's appetite for the company's "fly, fail, fix" approach to rocket development, which often ends in fireballs.

articles.title: Waze adds new AI-powered features and customization updates
articles.description: Some of the new features are powered by Google's Gemini AI assistant, which reflects the the tech giant's broader push to integrate Gemini across its products while also better positioning Waze to compete with rival services such as Apple Maps.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: UK Treasury report on tokenization cites Ripple as convergence model
articles.description: A Treasury-backed report targets putting repo, gilts and funds onchain within two years, and warms to permissionless networks that firms like Ripple have been building on.

articles.title: Tom Lee's BitMine ether holdings rise to 5.77 million tokens, or 4.8% of total supply
articles.description: The company expanded its ETH treasury while Chairman Tom Lee pointed to Robinhood Chain's rapid growth on Ethereum.

articles.title: Wall Street transfer agents lobby SEC, warning that third-party tokens pose risks to market integrity
articles.description: The Securities Transfer Association, an industry group for transfer agents, said company-authorized tokenization should receive preferential treatment under future rules.

articles.title: Coinbase Ventures tops crypto VC list for H1 2026
articles.description: Coinbase’s venture capital arm leads 2026 crypto investing even as funding withered and unique investors shied away amid the bear market.

articles.title: Strategy sells $467M in MSTR shares, leaves 843,775 BTC stack untouched
articles.description: Strategy boosted its US dollar reserve to $3 billion after selling $466.7 million in MSTR shares, while keeping its 843,775 Bitcoin holdings unchanged.

articles.title: Robinhood Chain surges into top five by DEX volume: Bernstein
articles.description: Robinhood's new blockchain quickly became a top-five network by DEX volume, signaling strong early demand for its tokenized asset platform, the broker said.

articles.title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy added $467 million in cash, made no changes to bitcoin holdings
articles.description: The company raised the fresh cash via sales of common stock; its USD Reserve now stands at $3 billion.

articles.title: UK tokenization push could add as much as $44B to annual output by 2035: Report
articles.description: The government-backed roadmap calls for the UK’s first digital gilt by early 2027 and seeks to make tokenized bonds usable for trading and borrowing.

articles.title: SBI Holdings' blockchain initiative pivots to Solana for tokenization, stablecoin issuance
articles.description: The SBI Solana Global joint venture now includes the Solana Foundation, the Swiss organization that oversees the layer-1 network.

articles.title: BlackRock, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan, Morgan Stanley join UK government's tokenization taskforce
articles.description: The 54 firm-strong group, which is backed by the City of London Corporation, will spend the next year working on live tokenisation use cases across UK financial markets.

articles.title: Bitcoin whale moves $188M for first time in 7 years
articles.description: A dormant whale transferred BTC worth $188 million after seven years of holding, adding to the growing ratio of whale transfers to cryptocurrency exchanges.

articles.title: Resurgent U.S.-Iran hostilities send bitcoin lower even as ETF flows show demand
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for July 13, 2026

articles.title: Binance June futures volume at $1.6T defies crypto spot trading slump
articles.description: Binance futures volume jumped 80% in June, to $1.61 trillion, outpacing rivals while broader crypto trading activity remained weak.
